title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Introduces supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and practical model deployment basics.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Covers text preprocessing, embeddings, transformers, and building NLP pipelines for real-world applications.

title: Cloud and Distributed Systems
description: Explains distributed system design, CAP theorem, service communication, and scalable cloud-native deployment strategies.

title: Recommender Systems
description: Presents collaborative filtering, content-based recommendations, ranking metrics, and hybrid recommendation approaches.

title: Data Mining
description: Introduces pattern discovery, clustering, association rules, and exploratory analysis on large datasets.

title: Software Architecture
description: Focuses on architectural styles, design trade-offs, quality attributes, and architecture documentation techniques.

title: Agile Project Management
description: Covers Scrum and Kanban practices, agile estimation, stakeholder communication, and iterative product delivery.

title: Information Retrieval
description: Teaches indexing, vector-space models, search relevance, and evaluation of retrieval quality.

title: Database Systems
description: Introduces relational modeling, SQL optimization, transactions, and practical data modeling for business systems.

title: Advanced Algorithms
description: Studies graph algorithms, dynamic programming, approximation methods, and algorithmic complexity analysis.
